steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to compare the curviness of the two rivers—not just explain what curviness is or how to calculate it, but state which one is actually curvier.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly compares the two rivers' sinuosity ratios, stating that the Embarras River's is greater than the Luni River's. The other three either reverse the rivers' sinuosity categories, explain the concept without comparing the rivers themselves, or describe the calculation method without performing the comparison. That matches choice B — B is correct.
